channel.title: Canadian Health Monitor
channel.description: Weekly Canadian EMR, EHR, digital health, privacy, cybersecurity, CIHI, Infoway, and regulatory updates.

item.title: Weekly Canadian Health Monitor Digest - 2026-07-20
item.description:
Top updates
- News release: Privacy Commissioner of Canada presents global Privacy and Human Rights Award to Canadian health research lab Source: Office of the Privacy Commissioner of Canada - News Published: Mon, 20 Jul 26 00:00:00 -0400 Matched keywords: privacy, health Link: https://www.priv.gc.ca/en/opc-news/news-and-announcements/2026/nr-c_260720/
- Media advisory: Privacy Commissioner of Canada to present 2026 global Privacy and Human Rights Award to Canadian health research laboratory Source: Office of the Privacy Commissioner of Canada - News Published: Fri, 17 Jul 26 00:00:00 -0400 Matched keywords: privacy, health Link: https://www.priv.gc.ca/en/opc-news/news-and-announcements/2026/ma_260717/
- Helping Canadians access safe, effective treatments and medicines faster Source: Health Canada Published: 2026-07-15T15:40:08-04:00 Matched keywords: regulatory, health, medical Link: https://www.canada.ca/en/health-canada/news/2026/07/helping-canadians-access-safe-effective-treatments-and-medicines-faster.html
